title: The Case of Poisons
writer: Henri Decoin, Georges Neveux, Victorien Sardou
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Viviane Romance, Paul Meurisse
plot: Madame de Montespan, the Maîtresse-en-titre of Louis XIV, has been in disgrace since the King set eyes on a younger beauty, Marie-Angélique Scorailles. Having had enough of the situation, the rejected mistress decides to visit La ...
